# PRODUCT EXECUTION MAP: NOW → FIRST SALE

**Product:** Multi-Vendor eCommerce Template (ThemeForest/CodeCanyon)  
**Current Status:** 12 high-quality demo templates complete  
**Target:** First sale within 3-4 weeks

---

## ✅ COMPLETED & FROZEN (DO NOT TOUCH)

**Template System:**

- [x] 4 homepage templates (Modern, Classic, Editorial, Minimal)
- [x] 4 category page templates (Grid Classic, Hero Split, Minimal, Showcase)
- [x] 4 product page templates (Classic, Editorial, Technical, Minimal)
- [x] Template architecture (content-only control, no page builder)
- [x] Template configuration and registration system

**Admin Content Management:**

- [x] Homepage content editor (with UX polish pass complete)
- [x] Category content editor
- [x] Image upload system v1
- [x] Template preview system

**Core Pages (Basic):**

- [x] Cart page (1 template)
- [x] Checkout page (1 template)
- [x] Login/Register pages
- [x] Basic vendor dashboard
- [x] Product listing/management

**Technical Foundation:**

- [x] React 19 + Vike SSR setup
- [x] Fastify backend + tRPC
- [x] PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- [x] Authentication system
- [x] Multi-vendor architecture

**DO NOT:** Add more templates, redesign existing pages, or expand content management.

---

## 🎯 REQUIRED BEFORE LAUNCH

### Phase 1: Missing Critical Pages (Days 1-5)

**1. Vendor Shop/Store Page** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] 3 vendor page templates (Grid, List, Minimal)
- [ ] Vendor header (logo, banner, bio, stats)
- [ ] Vendor product grid with filters
- [ ] Vendor contact/info section
- **Why:** Multi-vendor platform MUST show individual vendor stores
- **Time:** 3 days

**2. Search Results Page** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] 2 search result templates (Grid, List)
- [ ] Search filters sidebar
- [ ] Sort options
- [ ] "No results" state
- **Why:** Users must be able to search across all products
- **Time:** 2 days

### Phase 2: Template Selector (Days 6-8)

**3. Admin Template Selector UI** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] Template selection page (`/dashboard/admin/templates`)
- [ ] Visual preview cards for each template
- [ ] Live preview modal/iframe
- [ ] Save template selection per page type
- [ ] Apply changes without code edits
- **Why:** Core selling point - buyers switch demos with clicks
- **Time:** 3 days

### Phase 3: Demo Data (Days 9-11)

**4. Production-Quality Demo Site** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] 30-40 demo products with real images
- [ ] 6-8 demo vendors with profiles
- [ ] Demo content for all homepage/category variations
- [ ] Realistic product descriptions and pricing
- [ ] Demo orders and transaction history
- **Why:** Buyers judge quality by demo, not code
- **Time:** 3 days

### Phase 4: Documentation (Days 12-14)

**5. Marketplace Documentation** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] Installation guide (environment setup, database, deploy)
- [ ] Template switching guide (with screenshots)
- [ ] Content management guide (editing homepage, categories, products)
- [ ] Vendor onboarding guide
- [ ] Customization guide (colors, fonts, basic branding)
- [ ] FAQ (common questions, troubleshooting)
- **Why:** ThemeForest/CodeCanyon REQUIRES documentation
- **Time:** 3 days

### Phase 5: Sales Assets (Days 15-17)

**6. Marketplace Listing Materials** ✋ REQUIRED

- [ ] Product description (features, benefits, tech stack)
- [ ] Feature list (bullet points, organized by category)
- [ ] 12-15 high-quality screenshots (desktop + mobile)
- [ ] Demo video (60-90 seconds, template switching showcase)
- [ ] Change log template
- [ ] Support policy document
- **Why:** Required for submission, impacts conversion rate
- **Time:** 3 days

---

## 🎨 UX/UI POLISH PHASE (Days 18-21)

**Final pass only - NO new features, NO redesigns**

### Desktop Experience

- [ ] Visual consistency check across all 12 templates
- [ ] Hover states and micro-interactions
- [ ] Loading states and transitions
- [ ] Error states and empty states
- [ ] Form validation UX

### Mobile Experience

- [ ] Mobile layout review for all templates
- [ ] Touch target sizes (minimum 44x44px)
- [ ] Mobile navigation and interactions
- [ ] Responsive images and performance

### Admin Panel

- [ ] Template selector UX (preview, apply, clear flow)
- [ ] Content editor improvements (if needed)
- [ ] Dashboard responsiveness
- [ ] Form feedback and success states

### Performance & Accessibility

- [ ] Page load times (<3s on demo site)
- [ ] Image optimization
- [ ] Lighthouse score >90
- [ ] Basic accessibility audit (contrast, alt text, keyboard nav)

### Final QA

- [ ] Test all template combinations
- [ ] Cross-browser testing (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- [ ] Mobile device testing (iOS, Android)
- [ ] Template switching flow end-to-end
- [ ] Content editing workflow end-to-end

**Time:** 4 days

---

## 🚫 OUT OF SCOPE FOR V1 (EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN)

**Features NOT Building:**

- ❌ Additional templates (4 per page type is enough)
- ❌ Page builder / drag-and-drop editor
- ❌ Customer review/rating CRUD (display only)
- ❌ Wishlist with backend (UI only)
- ❌ Product variants (size, color, etc.)
- ❌ Multi-currency support
- ❌ Multi-language/i18n
- ❌ Advanced analytics dashboard
- ❌ Email marketing integration
- ❌ Social media integration
- ❌ Live chat widget
- ❌ Blog/CMS system
- ❌ Advanced shipping calculations
- ❌ Tax calculations
- ❌ Inventory management (beyond stock count)
- ❌ Product comparison tool
- ❌ Advanced search filters
- ❌ Dark mode
- ❌ Mobile app
- ❌ Payment gateway integration (beyond basic Stripe)

**Admin Features NOT Building:**

- ❌ Template customizer (colors, fonts)
- ❌ Advanced settings pages
- ❌ Role/permission management beyond basic vendor/admin
- ❌ Bulk product import/export
- ❌ Advanced reporting

**If it's not on the "Required Before Launch" list, it's v1.1 or later.**

---

## ✅ LAUNCH READINESS CHECKLIST

**Code Quality:**

- [ ] Zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] No console.logs or debug code
- [ ] Unused imports/files removed
- [ ] Code comments added to complex logic
- [ ] Consistent code style (run formatter)
- [ ] .env.example file with all required variables

**Demo Site:**

- [ ] Live demo deployed and accessible
- [ ] All 12 templates working
- [ ] Demo data populated
- [ ] Template switching works
- [ ] Mobile responsive verified
- [ ] Performance tested (<3s load)

**Documentation:**

- [ ] All 6 documentation pages complete
- [ ] Screenshots current and accurate
- [ ] Installation steps tested on clean machine
- [ ] No broken links

**Marketplace Submission:**

- [ ] Product description written
- [ ] Screenshot gallery ready (12-15 images)
- [ ] Demo video uploaded (if doing video)
- [ ] Feature list finalized
- [ ] Support policy defined
- [ ] Pricing decided

**Legal/Business:**

- [ ] License terms defined (regular vs extended)
- [ ] Support terms defined
- [ ] Update policy defined

---

## 🛑 STOP POINT → SWITCH TO SELLING

**When ALL boxes above are checked:**

1. **Submit to ThemeForest/CodeCanyon**

   - Upload package
   - Submit for review
   - Respond to reviewer feedback

2. **Launch Activities:**

   - Share demo on social media
   - Post in relevant communities (Reddit, Discord, forums)
   - Email existing network
   - Monitor ThemeForest listing

3. **DO NOT:**
   - Build "just one more feature"
   - Redesign any existing templates
   - Start work on v1.1
   - Perfect anything that's already "good enough"

**HARD RULE:** No new development until first sale.

---

## 📅 POST-LAUNCH (ONLY AFTER FIRST SALE)

### v1.1 (Customer-Driven, 2-3 weeks post-launch)

**Based on actual customer feedback:**

- Customer review system (if customers ask for it)
- Wishlist backend (if customers need it)
- Additional payment gateways (if customers request)
- Bug fixes and performance improvements
- Minor UX improvements from support tickets

### v1.2 (Sales-Driven, 4-6 weeks post-launch)

**Based on sales data and patterns:**

- Product variants (if data shows demand)
- Multi-language (if international buyers ask)
- Advanced vendor features (if vendors request)
- Additional integrations (based on requests)

### v2.0 (Future - Only if v1 is Successful)

- Page builder (only if customers desperately want it)
- Mobile app version
- Advanced marketplace features
- Enterprise features

**DO NOT think about v1.1+ until v1 is live and selling.**

---

| Phase                             | Days        | Cumulative  |
| --------------------------------- | ----------- | ----------- |
| Vendor shop page (3 templates)    | 3           | Day 3       |
| Search results page (2 templates) | 2           | Day 5       |
| Admin template selector           | 3           | Day 8       |
| Demo data + site setup            | 3           | Day 11      |
| Documentation (6 pages)           | 3           | Day 14      |
| Sales materials                   | 3           | Day 17      |
| UX/UI polish + QA                 | 4           | Day 21      |
| **TOTAL TO LAUNCH**               | **21 days** | **3 weeks** |

**Add 1-2 weeks for marketplace review = 4-5 weeks to first sale**

## 🎯 SUCCESS METRICS

**Pre-Launch (Must Hit All):**

- [ ] All 5 required pages complete with templates
- [ ] Template selector working end-to-end
- [ ] Demo site loads in <3 seconds
- [ ] Zero TypeScript/build errors
- [ ] Mobile responsive on all pages
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Sales materials ready

**Post-Launch (First 30 Days):**

- First sale within 14 days of approval
- 5+ sales in first month
- 4+ star average rating
- <5 support tickets per sale
- No critical bugs reported

---

## ⚡ EXECUTION DISCIPLINE

**Daily Checklist:**

1. Am I working on something in the "Required Before Launch" list?
2. If not, stop immediately
3. Does this move us closer to first sale?
4. If not, cut it

**Weekly Review:**

- What got done this week?
- What's blocking progress?
- Are we on track for 21-day timeline?
- Do we need to cut scope?

**Hard Rules:**

- NO new features unless explicitly in this doc
- NO redesigning completed work
- NO "nice to have" items
- NO building for imaginary customers
- NO gold-plating existing features

---

**REMEMBER:**

- We ship to learn, not to be perfect
- First sale validates the market
- Every day without launch is lost revenue
- Customers buy demos, not feature lists
- Launch → Feedback → Iterate

**THIS DOCUMENT DECIDES WHAT WE BUILD. NOTHING ELSE.**
